summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 10 testing of POS system: duplicate PIN prevention, 29 granular permissions, custom roles, physical keyboard login, user management UI, and role-based sidebar access

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for custom role creation
Test user creation failed because PIN 9999 already exists
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - test should clean up existing test data first

passed_tests: Physical keyboard login support (type digits + Enter key)
User name 'Admin' visible in sidebar after login
All 9 settings tabs present: Usuarios, Areas, Mesas, Pagos, Anulaciones, Productos, Ventas, Impresion, Estacion
Users tab shows users with edit/delete buttons
Add User dialog opens with form fields
29+ permissions visible with switch controls in user dialog
4 default role buttons: Administrador, Mesero, Cajero, Cocina
Custom role creation button '+ Rol' present
Carlos (waiter) login successful with name in sidebar
Carlos sidebar correctly shows only: Mesas, Cocina, Caja, Clientes, Reservas
Carlos lacks access to restricted areas (Dashboard, Settings, Reports)
29 granular permissions endpoint returns correct count
Duplicate PIN prevention with correct error message 'Ya existe un usuario con ese PIN'
Carlos waiter login with PIN 1234 with correct limited permissions
